units.content: a group contains at least one record produced by a physical measurement apparatus
a group contains at least one record produced by a computational measurer
the relative-spread measure is computed using all records in the group regardless of source tag
the group is classified under the four-valued classification using the relative-spread measure
at least one physical-interaction record is present in the group
admission of additional computational records is gated on continued presence of at least one physical-interaction record when classification is converged
computational records form a majority in a group classified as converged
a computational-record majority must not suppress admission of further physical-interaction records
the last physical-interaction record is removed from a converged group
removal of the last physical-interaction record causes re-classification of the group under the group-consists-entirely-of-computational-records rule of claim 4
